channel.title: Dbt on Lough on Data
channel.description: Recent content in Dbt on Lough on Data

item.title: Never Make Another dbt model .yml
item.author: connor@loughondata.com (Connor Lough)
item.description: A GitHub Action that runs dbt-osmosis + dbt2looker on every push, then commits the regenerated .yml and .lookml files back to your repo.

item.title: Data Vault walk-through: Fifty First Data Vaults
item.author: connor@loughondata.com (Connor Lough)
item.description: A talk to the UK Data Vault User Group on what went wrong (and right) across many iterations of building data vaults, and why the methodology is worth the heartache.

item.title: Creating a Mermaid Diagram for Your dbt Project Using graph.gpickle
item.author: connor@loughondata.com (Connor Lough)
item.description: Turn a dbt project’s compiled graph.gpickle into a Mermaid diagram so you can actually see what your models depend on.
